name: Eggplant Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the eggplants.
2. Cook the cubed eggplant in salted water with lemon juice until tender.
3. Drain the cooked eggplant and let it cool.
4. Mix the cooled eggplant with onion, tomatoes, celery, walnuts, and vinaigrette dressing.
5. Chill the mixture.
6. Serve on lettuce, garnished with hard-cooked eggs and olives.
